summary: Iteration 25 testing complete. All requested changes verified: 1) Academy Στατιστικά tab correctly filters out Βαθμοί (Points) - only shows Αγώνες, Νίκες, Ισοπαλίες, Ήττες. 2) DOB date input implemented across all player forms (PlayersTab, TeamsTab, AdminPlayerProfile, Academy) with auto-calculated age display in green text. 3) Stadium image on /about page updated to new customer-assets URL. 4) Footer text is in Greek.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 tested 3 UI changes: 1) Academy stats tab Βαθμοί removal - verified via filter on line 330 of AcademyGroupPage.jsx. 2) DOB date inputs - verified in PlayersTab (line 1001-1003), TeamsTab (line 1977-1979), AdminPlayerProfile (line 242-244), and Academy player forms (line 2370-2372) in AdminPanel.jsx. All use calcAge() function for auto-calculation. 3) Stadium image URL updated on line 930 of App.js. Admin login works with Enter key submission.
